mapper.select: SELECT l.`id`, l.`user_id`, l.`copy_id`, l.`loan_date`, l.`due_date`, l.`return_date`, l.`status`, l.`created_at`, u.`name` AS `user_name`, b.`title` AS `book_title`, b.`author` AS `book_author` FROM `dodamdodam`.`loans` AS l LEFT JOIN `dodamdodam`.`users` AS u ON l.`user_id` = u.`user_id` LEFT JOIN `dodamdodam`.`book_copies` AS bc ON l.`copy_id` = bc.`id` LEFT JOIN `dodamdodam`.`books` AS b ON bc.`book_id` = b.`id` ORDER BY l.`created_at` DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE `dodamdodam`.`loans` SET `status` = 'LOANED', `loan_date` = NOW(), `due_date` = DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 14 DAY) WHERE `id` = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT l.`id`, l.`user_id`, l.`copy_id`, l.`loan_date`, l.`due_date`, l.`return_date`, l.`status`, l.`created_at`, b.`title` AS `book_title`, b.`author` AS `book_author`, b.`cover_image` AS `book_cover` FROM `dodamdodam`.`loans` AS l LEFT JOIN `dodamdodam`.`book_copies` bc ON l.`copy_id` = bc.`id` LEFT JOIN `dodamdodam`.`books` b ON bc.`book_id` = b.`id` WHERE l.`user_id` = #{userId} ORDER BY l.`created_at` DESC
